chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 190 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.675/2019 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 23.11.2022 Mr. Irfan Mehdi Soomro, Advocate for respondents No.11 to 15. Mr. Shahryar Imdad Awan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the petitioners. Even on the last date of hearing, brief was held on behalf of learned Counsel for the petitioners. As per the comments filed by respondents No.1 to 6, the grievance of the petitioners has been redressed and perhaps due to this reason none has made appearance on their behalf; hence, the petition is dismissed accordingly along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
